task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenToonz main window and interface are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The dwanko_run.tnz scene is loaded in OpenToonz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The window title bar, scene browser, or canvas indicates that 'dwanko_run' is the currently active scene.

task_completion.description: The first animation column is renamed to 'HERO_WALK_V1'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Xsheet or Timeline panel, the header text of the first column (Column 1) clearly reads 'HERO_WALK_V1'.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is open and configured to export the Xsheet as an HTML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export Xsheet' or similar dialog is visible, with the output format explicitly set to HTML.

task_completion.description: The exported file is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog shows the filename 'xsheet_report.html' and the directory path '/home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/', or a terminal/file manager confirms the file's existence at this exact path.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenToonz GUI to rename the column and export the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through OpenToonz menus, Xsheet headers, and export dialogs rather than relying on scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or edit the HTML file using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) are seen being used to type out HTML code or the string 'HERO_WALK_V1'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to spoof the output file.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' are used to write HTML content directly into '/home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/xsheet_report.html'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Scene path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz. Expected column name: HERO_WALK_V1. Output path: /home/ga/OpenToonz/outputs/xsheet_report.html. Expected format: html.
